targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r._field == "scenario")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_alarms" and r._field == "fault_code")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_alarms" and r._field == "alarm_count")
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_alarms" and r._field == "critical_count")
  |> sum()

panels.title: Scenario Timeline — All Assets (normal=1, degraded=0.5, fault=0)
panels.description: Maps scenario string to numeric value. Drops to 0 on fault, 0.5 on degraded — easy visual of fault events over time.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r._field == "scenario_numeric")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Alarm Events Over Time — By Asset

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_alarms" and r._field == "alarm_count")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Press Fault Indicators — PR01 Hydraulic Pressure vs Threshold
panels.description: Hydraulic pressure dropping below ~170 bar indicates fault condition

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r._field == "hydraulic_pressure_bar")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Conveyor Jam Events — Speed Drop to Zero
panels.description: Speed dropping to 0 or near-0 indicates jam fault. Red threshold at 0.1 m/s.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r.asset_type == "conveyor" and r._field == "speed_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Robot R3 Spray Drift — Path Accuracy (mm)
panels.description: Path accuracy >0.5mm indicates spray drift fault. Robot R3 spray_drift scenario.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r.asset_type == "robot" and r._field == "path_accuracy_mm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Oven Sync Loss — CV04 vs OV01 Temperature
panels.description: oven_cv04_sync_loss fault: CV04 speed becomes erratic while OV01 zone temps spike

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r.asset_id == "conveyor_CV04" and r._field == "speed_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "CV04 speed_ms"}))

from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r.asset_id == "oven_OV01" and r._field == "zone3_temp_c")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _field: "OV01 zone3_temp_c"}))

panels.title: Sprayer Filter Blockage — Filter ΔP (bar)
panels.description: SP02 filter_dp_bar rising above 0.5 bar indicates filter_blocked fault

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r.asset_type == "sprayer" and r._field == "filter_dp_bar")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Press Die Wear (%) — Fault at >90%
panels.description: Die wear progresses over time; fault triggers at >90% wear

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r._field == "die_wear_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Compressor — Outlet Temp & Air Pressure
panels.description: CP01_overload: outlet_temp_c rises to ~105°C. compressed_air_leak: outlet_pressure_bar drops.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "Aurora")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aurora_data" and r.asset_id == "compressor_CP01" and (r._field == "outlet_temp_c" or r._field == "outlet_pressure_bar"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
